summary: AI/vibe coding, MCP scaffolding, and prompt generation rules for Sellsuki DS 2.0 compliance

golden_rule.statement: AI must generate according to design system rules. AI must NOT define design system rules from its own output.

minimum_fields: page_type (dashboard | list | detail | settings | form | report)
components = DS only unless explicitly approved
required_prompt_context.approved_prompt_snippet: Use Sellsuki Design System 2.0 canonical AppShell. Topnav owns ecosystem brand and workspace/account context. Left sidebar owns product navigation only. Use DS components and semantic tokens only. Default to light theme, DB HeaventRounded, Sky-based primary actions, Gray-based structure. Do not invent a new shell.

required: Use DS components — never create custom buttons, inputs, modals, navbars, sidebars
Use semantic color tokens — never hardcode hex values
Use DB HeaventRounded (var(--font-label)) for ALL text
Default to canonical AppShell 2.0 when shell is not specified
Handle loading (Skeleton/Spinner), empty (EmptyState), and error (Alert) states on all pages
Support dark mode via CSS variables
Include primary action button in PageHeader — max 1 per view
forbidden: Creating custom shell layout not based on canonical rules
Placing primary Sellsuki brand in sidebar as default
Using sidebar as ecosystem brand bar
Copying legacy shell as baseline without flagging as legacy
Hardcoding colors, fonts, border-radius, or spacing values
Using more than 1 primary button per view
Using Inter or any non-DB-HeaventRounded font for UI text

shadow.note: Minimal — prefer borders over heavy shadows

escalation_rules.if_existing_shell_does_not_match_canonic: Flag as legacy or exception — do not copy as baseline. Default back to canonical shell unless explicitly told otherwise.
escalation_rules.if_prompt_is_ambiguous: Default to canonical AppShell 2.0 — never invent a new shell.
escalation_rules.if_ds_component_missing: Create DS-based wrapper — never create product-level custom shell.

ai_mcp_vibe_coding: Never use sidebar-logo-led shell as default
Default to canonical shell when prompt is unclear
po_dev: Must brief shell rule — not just feature description
Cannot interpret shell from AI output without design review
Must use DS shell components only
uxui: Must provide shell rules as structured markdown or MCP-readable format
Must have forbidden patterns clearly stated
mcp_generator_authors: Generator template must embed shell rules in starter
Cannot scaffold starting from product-local custom shell
Cannot set brand placement with two standards without explicit flag

ai_behavior.default_when_unspecified: Canonical AppShell 2.0 with Sellsuki ecosystem brand in topnav, product navigation in left sidebar, light theme
must_do: Use DS components — never create custom equivalents
Keep product menu on left sidebar
Use sidebar for product modules only
Keep workspace and user menu in topnav
Use consistent page padding and section spacing
Handle all page states: loading, empty, error
must_not_do: Place full logo ownership in sidebar as default
Create custom navigation when DS already has TopNavbar and Sidebar
Hardcode colors, fonts, border-radius, or spacing
Copy legacy/exception shell as canonical baseline
Skip loading, empty, or error states
ai_behavior.escalate_when: Existing product shell does not match canonical — flag as legacy/exception and report before generating

compliance_checklist: DS components used for all UI — no custom equivalents
DS semantic tokens used — no hardcoded values
DB HeaventRounded font for all text
Loading, empty, error states present on all list/detail pages
No shell invention without governance approval

mcp_resources.description: Read full vibe coding and AI scaffold rules
Default values AI should use when prompt is unspecified
Approved prompt snippet to prepend to AI generation prompts
Required design tokens and import rules
